steps.title: Divide both sides by 0.01 to eliminate the coefficient
steps.content:
Starting with $$t = 0.01(p - 40 000)$$, divide both sides by 0.01 (equivalent to multiplying by 100):
$$\frac{t}{0.01} = p - 40 000$$
$$100t = p - 40 000$$

steps.title: Add 40 000 to both sides to isolate p
steps.content:
$$100t + 40 000 = p$$
Therefore $p = 100t + 40 000$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
